title: Substrate-block common definitions (v1)
description: Shared shapes referenced via $ref by the 6 substrate_block schemas. Citation regexes, withdrawn-status patterns, schema-version constraint.

schemaVersion.title: Schema version
schemaVersion.description: Pinned per-block at write time so the validator can refuse on mismatch and the migration script knows which transformer to apply.

citationArxivOrDoi.title: Primary citation (arXiv ID or DOI)
citationArxivOrDoi.description: arXiv ID format (arXiv:NNNN.NNNNN) or DOI (NN.NNNN/identifier). Hallucinated citation strings fail at parse time.

withdrawnStatus.title: Citation withdrawn status
withdrawnStatus.description: Either an enum value or a 'withdrawn YYYY-MM-DD' pattern. Used by verify_arxiv_citations.py as cross-check against arXiv API.

trustTier.title: Trust tier for training anchors / domain claims
trustTier.description: Substrate-grade trust tier. analytically_proven > numerically_certified > ml_predicted > unverified. Wave 3 of 2026-05-10 batch established this enum as load-bearing for AA-019/020/017.

verificationMethod.title: How a training anchor was verified

anchorIdAA.title: Anti-anchor ID
anchorIdAA.description: AA-NNN format. Use AA-XXX as placeholder when proposing a new anchor and letting ingest assign the next free ID.

compositionIdC.title: Composition rule ID
compositionIdC.description: C-NNN format. Use C-XXX as placeholder when proposing.

paradigmCandidateId.title: Paradigm candidate ID
paradigmCandidateId.description: P-CANDIDATE-<name> format until promoted; promoted form is P32, P33, ...

tensorCatalogEntryId.title: Tensor catalog entry ID (T#NN)
tensorCatalogEntryId.description: References an entry in aporia/mathematics/tensor_open_problems_v1.md. Cross-reference checked at validate-time.

substrateTier.title: Substrate primitive tier
substrateTier.description: A++ = TensorNetwork-level foundational; B = ConstructiveExistenceWitness; C = MomentPolytope/SecantVarietyEquation; D = GenericityAlmostEverywhereCert; E = RepresentationTheoreticInvariant. F/G are domain-anchor and method-synthesis tiers; outside_tier reserved for primitives that do not fit the existing scheme.

primitiveName.title: Primitive name (UpperCamelCase)
primitiveName.description: Substrate-grade primitive identifier. UpperCamelCase, no spaces, no underscores. Reject bare-noun ambiguous coordinate names: 'Rank', 'Complexity', 'Dimension', 'Degree' alone are rejected; use 'BorderRank', 'BilinearComplexity', 'KrullDimension', 'PolynomialDegree' etc.

primitiveFieldName.title: Primitive required-field name (snake_case)
primitiveFieldName.description: snake_case identifier for a required field on a primitive. HARD-5 enforcement: rejects bare-noun ambiguous coordinate names ('rank', 'complexity', 'dimension', 'degree' alone) — distinct coordinates must be carried as distinct fields.

fieldType.title: Field type annotation (informal)
fieldType.description: Type description for a primitive's required field. Free-form snake-case but should be readable as a Python type annotation.

verificationSource.title: Verification source string
verificationSource.description: Free-form human-readable verification provenance, e.g. 'Wave 1 Gemini Deep Research, prompt 01' or 'Techne fire #66 manual audit 2026-05-11'.

sourceReportRef.title: Source report reference (hand-authored or mined)
sourceReportRef.description: Free-form reference to the originating report, fire, or extraction site. Hand-authored examples: 'T#92', 'AA-013', 'report 04', 'fire #45', 'Wave 6'. Mined examples: 'extracted from aporia/docs/deep_research_batch_2026-05-10/report_T19_cactus_rank.md line 142 via extractor v0.1'. Per Aporia adjudication 2026-05-12 Mod 1: bumped maxLength 120 -> 400 to accommodate mined provenance descriptively without adding a new schema field. Runner stays producer-agnostic.
